# Book → machine assignments (SUPERSEDED — do not edit)

> 🚨 **This file is superseded.** It was the v1 static-assignment model.
> The single source of truth for cross-machine work assignment is now
> [`../book-queue.md`](../book-queue.md) which uses a pull-on-demand
> claim protocol (git push-rejection as mutex).
>
> Do NOT edit this file. Edits land on a vestigial doc and may confuse
> readers. If you need to change assignments: edit `../book-queue.md`.
>
> If you need to see the current snapshot of who-owns-what:
> see [`index.md`](index.md) (Machine Status section) or read
> `../book-queue.md` directly.
>
> This file is kept as a tombstone so old cross-references don't 404.
> When all such cross-references have been updated (target: 2026-Q3),
> delete this file entirely.

---

## What replaced this file

| Concern | Old (here) | New |
|---|---|---|
| Who owns which book right now | "Active assignments" table | [book-queue.md](../book-queue.md) "In-flight" section |
| What books are coming | (not tracked) | [book-queue.md](../book-queue.md) "Queue" section |
| Side-by-side machine state | (not tracked) | [index.md](index.md) "Machine Status" section |
| Static reassignment protocol | "Reassignment protocol" | [book-queue.md](../book-queue.md) claim + completion protocols |
| Crashed-machine reclamation | "Reclamation log" | [coordination-protocol.md §11](coordination-protocol.md#11-reclamation-machine-crash) |
| Why we changed | (n/a) | See [coordination-protocol.md v2 changes](coordination-protocol.md) |
